properties.description: This alert is intended only to act as an automation trigger for the Revoke Sessions playbook. This will ensure a baseline level of response is applied in all instances to prevent this activity from being missed even if it does fail to meet the criteria to convert to an incident.
properties.query:
let AlertScope = dynamic(["Anomalous Token", "Impossible travel", "Atypical travel", "Token issuer anomaly", "Unfamiliar sign-in properties"]);
let PreviouslyMitigated = SecurityAlert
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(6h) and TimeGenerated < ago(5m)
    | where AlertName in (AlertScope) or AlertName contains "Impossible travel"
    | project TimeGenerated, Entities, AlertName
    | extend AadUserId = iff(tostring(parse_json(Entities)[0]) contains "AadUserId", tostring(parse_json(Entities)[0].AadUserId), iff(tostring(parse_json(Entities)[1]) contains "AadUserId", tostring(parse_json(Entities)[1].AadUserId), iff(tostring(parse_json(Entities)[2]) contains "AadUserId", tostring(parse_json(Entities)[2].AadUserId), iff(tostring(parse_json(Entities)[3]) contains "AadUserId", tostring(parse_json(Entities)[3].AadUserId), ""))))
    | summarize count() by AlertName, AadUserId, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
    | project-reorder AadUserId;
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated > ago(5m)
| where AlertName in (AlertScope) or AlertName contains "Impossible travel"
| project TimeGenerated, Entities, AlertName
| extend AadUserId = iff(tostring(parse_json(Entities)[0]) contains "AadUserId", tostring(parse_json(Entities)[0].AadUserId), iff(tostring(parse_json(Entities)[1]) contains "AadUserId", tostring(parse_json(Entities)[1].AadUserId), iff(tostring(parse_json(Entities)[2]) contains "AadUserId", tostring(parse_json(Entities)[2].AadUserId), iff(tostring(parse_json(Entities)[3]) contains "AadUserId", tostring(parse_json(Entities)[3].AadUserId), ""))))
| summarize count() by AlertName, AadUserId
| project-reorder AadUserId, AlertName
| where AadUserId !in (PreviouslyMitigated)
